codeReview.summary: Re-run review confirming all 3 prior blocking issues remain unfixed. Git log shows no commits addressing these bugs. Recent commits (provenance tracking, staleness detection, scoping, promotion thresholds) are unrelated to the blocking issues.

issues.description: Confidence calculation passes sum of all pattern frequencies as denominator instead of actual total rejection count. In deduplicate_anti_patterns: `final_pattern.update_confidence(frequency_map.values().sum())` - this sums ALL pattern frequencies (e.g., if patterns X:3, Y:5, Z:2, sum=10) but total_rejections should be the actual number of rejection events (which is the length of the original patterns list before deduplication). This causes incorrect confidence values.

Convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. For line '- **name**: description', position 0='-', 1=' ', 2='*', 3='*', 4='n'. So `trimmed[3..colon_pos]` extracts '*name' not 'name'. Should be `trimmed[4..colon_pos]` to correctly skip '- **' prefix.

get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub that always returns empty vec with comment 'For MVP, return empty'. This function is supposed to retrieve anti-patterns for a given error type but does nothing. Code relying on this will always receive an empty result.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The convention parsing in parse_conventions_from_content expects a specific markdown format with '### TypeName' headers and '- **name**: description' bullet points. This internal format is not documented in AGENTS.md or elsewhere in shared state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Lines 1128-1146 show the parsing expects: '### ConventionType' headers followed by '- **name**: description' bullets. No documentation exists for this format.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The transcript shows the worker invoked 'Rust' skill instead of a specific pattern-learning or anti-pattern-extraction skill. No skill exists for teaching anti-pattern extraction methodology.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows: 'Skill: Rust' was invoked. No anti-pattern or pattern-learning specific skill was used.

fixAnalysis: This is a re-run confirmation - no fix was applied. Git log shows recent commits (3e08435, 0241792, 103568b, 37b8f4a) added unrelated features. None addressed the 3 blocking issues. All 3 bugs remain present in current HEAD.
summary: Re-run review confirming all 3 prior blocking issues remain unfixed. Issue 1: confidence denominator is sum of frequencies not total rejections. Issue 2: convention name parsing uses wrong slice index [3..] extracting '*name' instead of 'name'. Issue 3: get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub returning empty vec. No fix was applied - recent commits are unrelated.
